courses.title: HTML
courses.description: Learn the foundation of web development by building structured and semantic web pages using HTML. Perfect for beginners starting their frontend journey.Beginner

courses.title: CSS
courses.description: Learn how to style and design websites using CSS. Work with layouts, colors, fonts, and responsive design to create visually appealing pages.

courses.title: JAVASCRIPT
courses.description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals to make websites interactive. Understand variables, functions, conditions, loops, and DOM manipulation.

courses.title: REACT
courses.description: Learn React to build fast and reusable user interfaces. Understand components, props, state, and modern frontend development practices.

courses.title: NODE JS
courses.description: Learn Node.js to run JavaScript on the server and build backend applications, handle requests, then create simple APIs.

courses.title: EXPRESS JS
courses.description: Learn Express.js to build RESTful APIs and backend services. Learn routing, middleware, and server-side application structure.

projects.title: PORTFOLIO WEBSITE
projects.description: Create a responsive personal portfolio to showcase your projects, skills, and experience as a developer.

projects.title: WEATHER APP
projects.description: Develop a weather app that fetches real-time data from a weather API and displays forecasts using dynamic JavaScript.

projects.title: MOVIE APP
projects.description: Build a movie discovery app using React that allows users to search and explore movies through the TMDB API.

projects.title: FULL STACK APP
projects.description: Build a amazon clone using react and backend API with Node.js and Express.

testimonials.name: Arjun
testimonials.message: This platform helped me understand React easily and build real projects.

testimonials.name: Priya
testimonials.message: The learning path made it easy to move from HTML to full-stack development.

testimonials.name: Rahul
testimonials.message: Project-based learning helped me gain confidence in JavaScript.
